caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Increase
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing northeast winds of 22 kt and wave heights of 5.2 ft, while Ocho Rios has lighter conditions with winds of 11 kt. I expect the western Caribbean to see elevated rain probabilities, with a 53% chance of rain in the area, affecting ports like Roatan.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Increase
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing northeast winds of 25 kt and significant wave heights of 7.5 ft, with a 33% chance of rain, while Lisbon has relatively calm conditions with winds of 13 kt. I expect the Small Craft Advisory to remain in effect for the Eastern Mediterranean, particularly around Mykonos, due to the sustained winds and wave heights exceeding 7 ft for more than 2 hours.
